calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-034 closure-control-plane de-commit authority re-run on the TRAINED rule_bias_head (commitment_closure:GAP-4 Leg C); non-cap-pinned ON<OFF latch-occupancy-drop DV
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-4. Supersedes 460d. The Leg-C scaffold_train_rule_bias_head leg (598b REINFORCE in P1) landed 2026-06-16 (ree-v3 3ccc48a) -- 460d set lateral_pfc_train_rule_bias_head=True but never optimized the head, so the rule_state carried no magnitude and the de-commit had no MECH-090 latch authority (460d C2/C4 FAIL). 460e enables the scaffold leg + reads de-commit on a NON-CAP-PINNED ON<OFF beta-latch-occupancy drop (replaces 460d count-based C2 + cap-pinned C4). FOUR readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a false weakens): contact / rule_bias_head-trained (mean |bias| > floor -- the direct anti-460d-bug gate) / beta-engagement-both-arms (the 468d commit-without-beta guard) / closure-trigger. PASS -> supports SD-034/MECH-261, MECH-260 supports; readiness-met-criteria-unmet -> genuine weakens (route /failure-autopsy). Smoke: validator --strict OK; dry-run end-to-end self-routes substrate_not_ready (rule_bias leg trained, mean |bias| 0.036). Do NOT start runner (cloud auto-claims).

items.title: MECH-048 mu/kappa stability overlay probe (temperature as proxy for stability modulation)
items.note: Tests MECH-048 using temperature modulation as a proxy for mu/kappa stability overlays. mu_condition (T=0.5) should reduce entropy and switching, kappa_condition (T=2.0) should increase both. Measures action entropy, switching rate, and commitment duration across 3 conditions x 3 seeds. Part of EXP-0183 proposal.
